assertions.title: Telemetry captures token usage per run (TokenUsage with prompt/completion/total, default 0)

steps.expected: TokenUsage tests pass, verifying prompt/completion/total fields with default 0
steps.observed: All 42 telemetry tests passed. TestTokenUsage::test_defaults_to_zero confirmed prompt=0, completion=0, total=0 defaults. TestTokenUsage::test_explicit_values confirmed explicit prompt/completion/total set correctly. TestTelemetrySchema::test_token_usage_defaults_to_zero confirmed TokenUsage defaults in the Telemetry schema.

assertions.title: Telemetry schema is versioned and forward-compatible (unknown fields ignored)

steps.expected: Forward compatibility tests pass — unknown fields are ignored when deserializing
steps.observed: TestTelemetrySchema::test_version_field_present confirmed version field exists. TestTelemetrySchema::test_forward_compatibility_unknown_fields_ignored confirmed extra fields in JSON don't cause errors. TestTelemetrySchema::test_forward_compat_with_extra_numeric_fields confirmed numeric extra fields also handled. TestTelemetrySchema::test_json_round_trip confirmed serialization preserves version.

assertions.title: TelemetryCollector supports track_phase() context manager for duration tracking

steps.expected: TelemetryCollector track_phase context manager tests pass with duration tracking
steps.observed: TestTelemetryCollector::test_track_phase_records_duration confirmed context manager records duration. TestTelemetryCollector::test_track_phase_setup confirmed 'setup' phase. TestTelemetryCollector::test_track_phase_teardown confirmed 'teardown' phase. TestTelemetryCollector::test_phase_accumulation confirmed nesting accumulates. TestTelemetryCollector::test_multiple_phases confirmed sequential phases work. TestTelemetryCollector::test_total_s_is_updated confirmed total_s updates from phases.

assertions.title: Configuration resolution across all subsystems — single config change propagates correctly

steps.expected: Config tests pass, verifying env var and CLI overrides propagate
steps.observed: 42 config tests passed. Env var override tests (test_env_var_overrides_yaml_timeout, test_env_var_overrides_yaml_model, etc.) confirmed YAML→env→CLI precedence. Nested validation confirmed error path specificity.

All TestConfigResolutionAcrossSubsystems tests passed: test_config_loads_all_sections, test_config_tasks_use_schema_types, test_config_artifacts_use_schema_types, test_config_change_propagates_to_harness_config, test_env_var_override_propagates_to_subsystems, test_telemetry_config_propagates, test_single_config_multiple_tasks.
All TestConfigChangeEffects tests passed: test_model_change_affects_harness_config, test_timeout_change_affects_all_subsystems, test_telemetry_trace_flag_propagates.

evidence.testResults: test_config.py: 42 passed in 0.22s; test_cross_schema_consistency.py: 30 passed in 0.35s

assertions.title: Schema consistency — schemas defined in core are used without redefinition by downstream modules

steps.action: Run uv run ty check src/grist_mill/
steps.expected: Type checking passes with no errors

steps.observed: 30 tests passed including TestNoSchemaRedefinitions, TestSchemaIdentity, TestSchemaChangePropagation, TestSchemaRoundTrips classes

evidence.typeChecker: ty check src/grist_mill/ → All checks passed!

summary: Tested 5 assertions: all 5 passed. VAL-TELEM-01 (token usage with defaults), VAL-TELEM-04 (versioned forward-compatible schema), VAL-TELEM-05 (track_phase context manager), VAL-CROSS-02 (config resolution across subsystems), VAL-CROSS-03 (schema consistency — no redefinitions outside schemas/, type checking passes, identity tests pass). Total test results: 42 telemetry + 42 config + 30 cross-schema = 114 tests, all passing.
